title: Query on large string table fails on HEAPextend
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE large_strings(id INTEGER, data TEXT);
INSERT INTO large_strings VALUES (1, 'a' || substr('b', 1, 1) || repeat('b', 999999));
CREATE TABLE another_table(id INTEGER, ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES large_strings(id));
key_bug_features: Query on large string table fails
